response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, hands-on senior engineer with roughly 19 years of experience spanning web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus genuine entrepreneurial credentials as founder of an open-source geo-data platform. However, this is a director-level IC role centered on AI strategy, and his AI exposure is limited to about a year of MCP/agentic tooling work at his current job. He shows no track record of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products or platforms, cloud/AI strategy leadership, or advising executives and strategic customers — his trajectory is strong senior/staff execution, not principal-level strategic influence.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems, exceeding the 15-year bar
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and sustains an open-source geo-data platform (Northwind Labs / GISCollective) used by real organizations
Current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, plus community visibility through conference talks and workshops
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale; AI experience is roughly one year of tooling work
Career has been at senior/staff developer level with no evidence of director-level scope, strategy ownership, or advising strategic customers/partners
Limited depth in cloud platform strategy; cloud experience is project-level (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployment) rather than architectural or organizational

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC scope
Shallow AI/ML depth for an AI strategy role
Long, broad engineering experience with entrepreneurial and open-source credentials
